Sign in Start earning
Lumi for Computer App

Monetize your downloaded AI app — sound video included.

Electron, Tauri, native — if it's installed on Mac/Windows/Linux, Lumi can serve ads inside it. Window banners, sidebar slots, modal interstitials, and pre-roll video with sound (no browser autoplay restriction). 10 placements per app.

Start as a publisher →
See it appear

Your AI app responds first.
The sponsored block slides in after.

No interruption. No latency. Renders inside the desktop window — Electron, Tauri, or native — with sound video allowed.

Lumi renders inside your desktop window with native chrome — Electron, Tauri, or native macOS/Windows/Linux. Sponsored blocks slide in after your AI output, with a clear disclosure label.
Placements you can serve

10 placements built for desktop AI apps.

Sponsored citation$6.50 RPM
Suggested chip$5.00 RPM
Inline card$8.00 RPM
Loading-state ad$4.50 RPM
Pre-roll video (sound on)$18.00 RPM
Window banner$7.50 RPM
Sidebar slot$6.00 RPM
Modal interstitial$12.00 RPM
Empty-state hero$5.50 RPM
System notification$9.00 RPM
How it works

From npm install to first impression in under 10 minutes.

1

Install in your desktop app

Run npx @boostbossai/install-desktop YOUR_PUBLISHER_ID in your Electron, Tauri, or native build. The CLI wires up the SDK and initializes it for you.

2

Mount placements

Pick from 10 placement types — window banner, sidebar slot, modal interstitial, pre-roll video. Mount one or all.

3

Earn per impression

Boost Boss serves desktop-grade creatives with sound video allowed. You earn on every impression and every click.

Integration snippet

A few lines, your desktop app.

# One-time install in your Electron, Tauri, or native project root:
npx @boostbossai/install-desktop pub_xxx

# That's it. The CLI injects this into your renderer HTML for you:
<script async src="https://boostboss.ai/lumi/v1.js#publisherId=pub_xxx&door=mcp"></script>

# All 10 placements auto-mount on first launch. Window banner,
# sidebar slot, modal interstitial, pre-roll video, and more.
# No JS imports needed — placements attach to your renderer's DOM.

Sound video allowed — desktop apps aren't subject to browser autoplay rules. Full docs →

Real render. Sponsored block inside a downloaded desktop AI app — your window chrome, Lumi's bordered card.
Who this is for

If your AI app is downloaded, this is your path.

  • ✓You ship an Electron, Tauri, or native macOS / Windows / Linux app.
  • ✓Examples: AI writing tools, code assistants, research apps, AI notetaking, desktop chat clients.
  • ✓You want sound-on video inventory that browsers can't fill — pre-roll and modal interstitials at premium CPMs.
  • ✓You'd rather earn from ads than push freemium upsells in your own product.
Revenue example

What 5,000 daily users can earn.

Illustrative — not a guarantee
Daily active users5,000
Ad impressions per user per day~5
Daily impressions25,000
Blended eCPM (10 placements, sound video premium)$5
Monthly publisher revenue~$3,750

Numbers are illustrative for an established downloaded AI app. Actual revenue depends on session length, placement mix, fill rate, and audience. Apps that activate pre-roll video and modal interstitials sit at the top of the range.

Frequently asked

The questions every desktop dev asks first.

Does this work in Electron?

Yes. Lumi for Computer App ships first-class Electron support — runs in the renderer process, respects your contextIsolation and CSP settings, and doesn't require nodeIntegration.

What about Tauri and native macOS/Windows/Linux?

Tauri uses a WebView, so the same JS package mounts inside. Native macOS (Swift), Windows (.NET/WinUI), and Linux apps use our REST API directly — same publisher ID, same dashboard.

Can I really play video with sound?

Yes. Desktop apps escape browser autoplay rules — pre-roll video and modal interstitials can play with sound on by default. That's why desktop apps clear the highest video CPMs in the Lumi network.

Can I block specific advertisers?

Yes. Category-level blocks (e.g., no recruiting ads) and domain-level blocks (e.g., never these specific competitors) — all controlled from your publisher dashboard.

Does the app need to be always-online?

No. Lumi degrades gracefully when offline — placements simply don't render. We don't block your AI feature on ad load.

Ready to monetize your downloaded AI app?

10 placements. Sound video. Ten minutes to install. Weekly payouts.

Apply as a Founding Publisher →
